title: Enterprise Rollout KPI Update
audience: Enterprise product, engineering, and go-to-market leaders deciding rollout scope
desired_action: Decide whether to expand the new model rollout to all enterprise tenants next week

must_include: ChatGPT enterprise activation: 52.5%, up 7.1 points month over month
New model rollout: 3 staged cohorts, no critical incidents
Main risk: two regulated customers still need data residency review
Required decision: whether to expand the rollout to all enterprise tenants next week
must_avoid: inventing missing denominators or tenant counts
fabricating customer names, review dates, or cohort names
adding metrics not present in the source notes
global_facts: Activation is up 7.1 points month over month
The model rollout used 3 staged cohorts
The rollout had no critical incidents
Two regulated customers still need data residency review
The decision is whether to expand to all enterprise tenants next week
optional_support: Use the supplied facts as decision evidence
Show risk as a launch gate, not as a new metric

narrative.thesis: Activation and latency are moving in the right direction, but all-tenant expansion still depends on the regulated-customer residency review.
